issues.description: Condition missing: '[On Play] If your opponent has 2 or more Characters with a base power of 5000 or more' requires a condition to check opponent's board state. Current condition is 'Always', which ignores the 'If' clause entirely. Should include a condition checking opponent board for characters meeting power threshold.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If your opponent has 2 or more Characters with a base power of 5000 or more, draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.
